notes: AD95 alumina ceramic — alternative materialId key. Same properties as ceramic_ad95. 95% Al2O3 by CoorsTek. RHAe ~2.3-2.5 per mm vs KE per manufacturer data.

source.reference: CoorsTek AD95 technical datasheet, mirror of ceramic_ad95 entry
source.methodology: RHAe from CoorsTek published ballistic test data for AD95 vs AP threats. Duplicate key for alternative materialId lookup.
